meta.title: Sprinkle of Sage — Store Demo
meta.description: A walkthrough demo of the Sprinkle of Sage e-commerce boutique

scenes.narration: Introducing Sprinkle of Sage. A curated boutique for those who appreciate mindful, sustainable living.
The storefront welcomes visitors with a clean, inviting design. Every detail is crafted to reflect the brand's commitment to natural simplicity.
Customers can browse the full collection, with each product thoughtfully presented. From handmade goods to sustainable essentials, the shop is built for discovery.
Adding items to the cart is seamless. Customers can review their selections and proceed to checkout with confidence.
Behind the scenes, the admin dashboard gives store owners a clear view of revenue, orders, and product performance at a glance.
The AI listing assistant is a standout feature. Upload product photos, answer a few guided questions, and the AI generates complete, SEO-optimized product listings in seconds.
Sprinkle of Sage. Where mindful commerce meets modern technology. Visit the store today.
